description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs python setup.py test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that only runs on the master branch, runs pip install --user --upgrade pip setuptools wheel twine, builds source and wheel packages with python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, and uploads them to PyPI using python -m twine upload -u $PYPI_USERNAME -p $PYPI_PASSWORD dist/*. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, or additional variables.
